Bash(for file in client/src/components/navbar.tsx client/src/components/create-tender-modal.tsx client/src/components/tender-card.tsx client/src/components/submit-offer-modal.tsx; do
  if grep -q "useI18n" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "$file: HAS useI18n"
  else
    echo "$file: NO useI18n"
  fi
done)
